title: 三人寄れば一流の知恵

text_block_list.text:
There's a fan meet-and-greet event today with
King Halo and other students in her year.

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Good luck in your next race, King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I plan to win, so make sure to watch.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Just look how those cute little eyes sparkle.
choice_data_list: Best not to let them down, right?
Best not to let them down, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But of course. How could a first-rate such as
myself go around crushing children's dreams?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: King, it's almost time.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Are you ready to rumble?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Our fans came all the way here to see us, so let's
show them our gratitude.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What's all this about rumbling and gratitude?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Did you forget about the mini-concert after the
meet and greet?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh?! A mini-concert?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Judging by your reaction... Don't tell me...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But now that I think about it, you did miss
practice because something came up.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Still, you said you'd practice on your own.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
O-of course not! I just filed it away in my memory
for later!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But this isn't good... I haven't practiced the
dance, much less memorized the lyrics!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh my, this is troubling. What to do, then?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And I was just saying I wouldn't crush anyone's
dreams!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It is troubling! But no need to worry!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The world's hella strongest, El Condor Pasa, is
here! I'll never abandon you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No hay problema! I'll get you caught up right now!
With my instruction, our grand finale is secure!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Right now?! That's far too simple a plan! Surely it
takes some time to learn everything.
choice_data_list: Let's see what Grass Wonder thinks.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?! You're ignoring me?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, if two heads are better than one, I suppose
three would be all the better. What do you think
we should do, Grass?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well, this mall does have a music store...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What if we change the song to something the
three of us already know?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Change the song?! That's a beautiful idea!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh... That's disappointing, but I guess it's
better than learnin' from scratch.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
King! Grass! Let's pick a song we can all already
sing and dance to!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, let's! I'll buy the CD once we find something
suitable!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Grass, El Condor Pasa, I'm in your debt!
A little while later...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The three of us are here to give an unforgettable performance! Here we go, Umapyoi Legend!
Wooooo!

Thanks to their quick thinking, King Halo and the
others have managed to pick the right song and
please their fans.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: All right, got it! El Condor Pasa, if you please!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Okay! Leave it to me!
Fifteen minutes later...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: And so, today's main event is...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
An El Condor Pasa vs. King Halo exhibition
match!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: U-uh, are we really going to do this?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If you think about it, there's no way you can learn
a whole song so quickly!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So, instead of a mini-concert, it's lucha libre time!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I know you're new at this, but don't worry! I'll
keep you safe and the crowd pumped!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Now, show me what you got!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm not really sure what I've got, though!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Good luck out there, you two!

The planned mini-concert has turned into a
professional wrestling match. Surprisingly though,
it's received well by the fans!
